Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relived As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF AIGUL MYEKYEI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relived As Counsel is GRANTED. Counsel has made the required showing supported by declaration and the Plaintiff has filed no objection. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relived As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-17-2023 Continued To Mar-24-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AIGUL MYEKYEI'S Motion To Be Relived As Counsel.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on Friday, March 24, 2023. That department handles all landlord-tenant/real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. The moving party is instructed to deliver a courtesy copy to Department 501 no later than March 17, 2023.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-10-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF AIGUL MYEKYEI MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Appearance:
Megan Alexander, Esq. of ELLEN GREGORY LAW, Tel:510.255.1966, appearing for moving party Ellen Gregory;
No other appearance.

Ms. Alexander asked the court for clarification of the tentative ruling.

There being no objection, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF AIGUL MYEKYEI is

DENIED without prejudice. The declaration must be on Form MC-052, and all appropriate boxes on that form must be checked. A completed proposed order on Form MC 053 must be provided. See CRC 3.1362. All papers must be also provided as paper courtesy copies. Local Rule 2.7(B).

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/CK)
